arts.ttl: Andrea Cambiaso: “Wearing the Juve shirt is the most beautiful thing in the world”
arts.sum: Juventus player Andrea Cambiaso recently participated in the Young Reporter initiative, answering questions from young fans about his time with the club. This project, reserved for Junior Black&White Members, offers the opportunity to become journalists for a day, interviewing the team’s champions. Cambiaso emphasized the importance of being passionate about one’s pursuits. “Be passionate about what you do, whatever it is. You have to give your all. I gave everything to be here, and I was also lucky,” he shared. arts.ttl: Thiago Motta: “It’ll be an open game against Leipzig, we are two similar teams.”
arts.sum: Ahead of Juventus’ upcoming Champions League match against RB Leipzig, head coach Thiago Motta shared his thoughts on the challenge awaiting his team. Speaking to Sky Sport, Motta emphasized the open nature of the contest and the similarities between the two sides. “Leipzig lost while playing well and showing important football against Atletico Madrid,” Motta began. “I think it will be an open match. They will press high with the intention to attack.
